creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 173124
fontforge-20160404.patch

* Update to 20160404
* Updated distinfo
* Removed configure patch, didn't seem necessary
* Cairo appears to be linked in regardless of the CAIRO option being set, not sure why but I set the port to have a cairo dependency regardless
* Chase freetype version (I have yet to ask the fontforge developers why they need the source code of freetype to compile the freetype debugger within fontforge)
